Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account (For The Benefit Of Minor: Nicholas Chan)
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Continued To Jan-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Jason A.J. Lundberg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Linh Yen, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Nicholas Chen; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $197,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $48,850.05 payable to Allegiance Law.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the Petitioner's Attorney in the total amount of $1,599.79.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of: $65,360.27 to Payee: Accent 7171 Mercy Road, PO Box 69006, Omaha, NE 68106-5006 in the amount:$58,695.95
to Payee: Trover Solutions P.O. Boc 36380, Louisville, KY 40233 in the amount of $6,664.32.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $115,810.11
The net balance of $81,189.89 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America 245 Winston Drive, San Francisco, CA 94132 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 16, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
